name: trove
description: Trove — a desktop storefront for GitHub with an embedded terminal.
author: Trove

scripts.dist: npm run build && { [ -f .env.release ] && set -a && . ./.env.release && set +a || true; } && rm -rf release && PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH" electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && rm -rf release && PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH" electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.release: npm run build && { [ -f .env.release ] && set -a && . ./.env.release && set +a || true; } && rm -rf release && PATH="/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin:$PATH" electron-builder --mac --publish always
